name: Stale quest
note_template: '{quest_name}' has idled too long — move it: a lead surfaces, a rival acts first, or a deadline lands. Advance it through the world, not exposition.

name: Wounded player
note_template: The Player is badly hurt — let the world SEE it: NPCs react, tasks get harder, rest tempts. Danger is sharper now; do not wave it away.

name: Defeat aftermath
note_template: The Player was just defeated — the consequences still hang in the air. Someone remembers; something was lost; word travels. Let the aftermath shape this scene.

name: Hook wanted
note_template: No objective is on the table. Seed a hook worth chasing — a request, a rumor, a debt called in — and mark it with a [quest | <Name> | new | <detail>] tag when the Player bites.
